species: This study aimed to investigate the molecular differences in PTDM by mapping the proteomes of proximal tubuli and serum in normoglycemic (NG), pre‐transplant T2DM, and PTDM patients one year post‐transplantation.
tissue: Proteomic analysis was performed on microdissected proximal tubular cells and serum samples from kidney transplant recipients...
cell_type: Proteomic analysis was performed on microdissected proximal tubular cells and serum samples...
disease_state: However, post‐transplant diabetes mellitus (PTDM) increases mortality and graft loss.
sample_source: Proteomic analysis was performed on tubuli isolated from FFPE kidney biopsies...
age: T2DM patients were diagnosed with DM between 2 and 31 years prior to transplantation.
